description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a large front yard and a driveway leading up to the entrance. The structure features a flat, multi-tiered roof with clean, angular lines and a prominent overhang. A spacious swimming pool is situated adjacent to the house, bordered by a wooden deck that extends from the main living area. The facade includes large windows and a main entrance accessible by a set of steps, while the side and rear elevations show additional windows and a continuous band of exterior wall. Three display boards are positioned near the street, likely for signage or property information. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor space, geometric forms, and a blend of functional and aesthetic elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, multi-tiered roof, large windows, a wooden deck, and an adjacent swimming pool on a landscaped plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, steps, large windows, wooden deck, swimming pool, driveway, and three display boards near the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof's overhang, the pool's proximity to the house, and the driveway extending from the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous exterior wall, additional windows, and the pool running along the side of the house.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the pool, deck, and the arrangement of windows along the side and back of the bungalow.
